verses.text: Tua kum mahin (Judah gamah Zedekiah kumpi a suah zawh kum li leh kha nga a phak kum) Gibeon khua panin a hong pai Azzur' tapa kamsang Hananiah in Topa' biakinnpi sungah siampite leh mi khempeuh a omkim laitakin hong hopih a
“Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hong genin-ah: Babylon kumpipa' vangliatna ka susia khin hi
Kum nih sungin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar in hih mun pan lakhia-in Babylon khua-ah a puak, Topa' biakinnpi sunga beelte hih munah ka lakik ding hi

Jehoiakim' tapa Judah kumpi Jehoiakhin leh Judah gam panin Babylon-ah salin a paite khempeuh zong hih munah ka lakik ding hi, Topa in hong ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Babylon kumpipa' vangliatna ka susia ding hi, ci hi,” a hong ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa' biakinnpi sung-ah dingin a om siampite leh mi khempeuhte a omkim laitakin keimah Jeremiah in Hananiah ka hopih a

“Amen! Topa in tua na gen bangin hong sem ta hen. Topa in na thugenkholhna bangin hong tungsak hen la, Babylon khua panin Topa' biakinnpi sunga beelte leh salin a kimante khempeuh hih lai munah hong lakik tapeuh hen
Ahi zongin tu-in nang leh mi khempeuhte' zakin kong gen ding hih thu na ngai ta un
Nang leh kei' ma-in a om, tanglai-a kamsangte in gam tampi leh gam liante' tungah gal ahi zongin, kial ahi zongin, pulnatna ahi zongin hong tung ding hi, ci-in a genkholzo uh hi
Ahi zongin, nopna hong tung ding hi, ci-in a gen kamsangpa pen Topa' hong sawl kamsangpa hi taktak hiam, cih kamsangpa' gen bang hong tun' ciangin a kithei pan ding ahi hi,” ka ci hi
Tua ciangin kamsangpa Hananiah in ka ngawng panin ka hakkol hong lakkhiat sakin hong kuaihtansak hi

Hananiah in zong mi khempeuh a om laitakin thu gen a, “ Topa in, tu-a bangin Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar' vangliatna kum nih sungin gam khempeuhte' tung panin ka beisak ding hi, ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi. Tua ciangin kei ka paikhia hi
Kamsangpa Hananiah in ka ngawng panin ka hakkol lakhia a, hong kuaihtansak zawh tawlkhat khit ciangin Topa in kei hong hopih a
“Pai in la Hananiah kiangah, ‘ Topa in hih bangin hong ci hi: Nangmah in sing tawh kibawl hakkol na kuaitanzo hi. Ahih hangin keimah in sik tawh kibawl hakkol khat tawh ka laih ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Vanglian Topa, Israel mite' Pasian in hong genin-ah: Hih gam khempeuhte' ngawngah sik hakkol ka thuah khinzo a, amaute in Babylon kumpipa Nebukhadnezzar' na a sem ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh gamsate nangawn ama tungah ka pia khinzo hi, ci hi,’ va ci in,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin kei zong kamsang Hananiah' kiangah, “Na ngai in, Hananiah! Topa in nang hong sawllohpi, hih mite zuauthu na umsak hi
Tua ahih manin Topa in a hong genin-ah: ‘En in, hih leitung panin nangmah hong lakhia ding hi. Topa langpan'na thu gen na hih manin tu kum sung mahin na si ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” ka ci hi
Tua kum mah a kha sagih kha-in kamsangpa Hananiah a si ta hi.
